front.title: Appendix A. Complete PoS Annotations of the Beiyou shi

section.title: Tag-processing Rules
section.p: Appendix A. Complete PoS Annotations of the Beiyou shi
This appendix provides the complete line-level PoS annotations used in the study. The annotations preserve token segmentation and final adjudicated PoS categories for each poem.

The annotations below are final analytical tags rather than raw HanLP outputs. The final tags were generated through a post-processing procedure that combines HanLP UPOS output, HanLP PKU-style output, lexicon-based correction, and dynamic adjudication.

Raw PKU-style tag normalization. PKU-style labels were first normalized before comparison with UPOS output. Morpheme-level PKU labels were mapped to their corresponding lexical categories: Ag → a, Bg → b, Dg → d, Mg → m, Ng → n, Rg → r, Tg → t, Vg → v, and Yg → y. Other PKU-style labels were preserved at this stage when available, including ad, an, vd, vn, nr, ns, nt, nx, and nz.

UPOS-to-analysis mapping. UPOS labels were mapped onto the same analytical tag system used for the final dataset: NOUN and PROPN → n; VERB → v; ADJ → a; ADV → d; PRON and DET → r; NUM → m; ADP → p; AUX and PART → u; CCONJ and SCONJ → c; INTJ → e; PUNCT → w; and SYM or X → x.

Coarse analytical categories. For coarse statistical comparison, related fine-grained tags were collapsed into broader analytical categories. Nominal subtypes, including n, nr, ns, nt, nx, and nz, were collapsed into n; verbal subtypes, including v, vd, and vn, were collapsed into v; and adjectival subtypes, including a, ad, and an, were collapsed into a. Fine-grained distinctions were retained in the token-level output only when they were compatible with the final coarse category. This design reduces sparsity and avoids overinterpreting unstable low-frequency distinctions in a relatively small Classical Chinese poetic corpus.

Lexicon-based correction. Before adjudication, lexicon-based correction was applied to recurrent multi-character expressions and identifiable tagging errors. The correction procedure could either merge a sequence of tokens and assign a corrected tag, or override the tag of an already segmented token. These corrections were applied as post-processing rules and did not retrain or fine-tune the HanLP model.

Dynamic adjudication. UPOS and PKU-style tags were not treated as competing final standards. Instead, they served as complementary inputs. When the two outputs agreed at the coarse analytical level, the shared category was retained. When they diverged, the script applied pre-specified adjudication rules. Recurrent conflict types identified during manual review were handled by fixed priority rules, such as preferring PKU-style adjectival classification when UPOS classified the same token as verbal, or preserving PKU-style temporal, locative, and numerical distinctions when UPOS assigned a broader category. Other conflicts were resolved with the aid of dependency-relation cues and local contextual evidence derived from surrounding tokens on which UPOS and PKU-style tags agreed.

Diagnostic information. Each token was assigned a final tag, a coarse category, a fine category when applicable, an adjudication source, and a heuristic confidence score. These confidence scores were used only for diagnostic review and were not used as probabilistic measurements or as variables in the statistical analysis.

poem.title: 南城郭冀州，在南方時，予尚小，撫若己子，常受其家供養。今天八十餘矣，強建如五六十人。至京往見以詩贄云。

太/d 平/a 隨/v 處/n 有/v 笙/n 歌/n
花/n 開/v 上/f 國/n 宜/v 春/n 苑/n
詩/n 滿/v 南宮/ns 瑞/a 錦/n 窠/n
黃/n 鳥/n 語/n 來/v 深/a 巷/n 靜/a
白/n 雲/n 飛/v 去/v 好/a 山/n 多/a

且/d 洗/v 君/n 家/n 鸚鵡/n 螺/n

poem.title: 送僧遊高丽
poem.l: 前/t 年/t 同/d 居/v 密/a 的支/ns
今/t 年/t 獨/d 走/v 高/a 句麗/n
度/v 遼/ns 向/v 晚/a 泊/v 何/r 處/n

誰/r 家/n 女/n 子/n 化/v 龍/n 去/v
出/v 沒/v 波/n 間/f 常/d 護/v 持/v

poem.title: 贈王使君
poem.l: 君/n 持/v 使/n 節/n 過/v 繩/n 橋/n
已/d 遣/v 蠻/n 夷/nr 感/v 聖/n 朝/n
良/a 將/n 未/d 誇/v 班定遠/nr

歸/d 來/v 莫/d 惜/v 鬢/n 蕭蕭/a

poem.title: 正月二十日贈東平進士丘公佐殿試在迩作此先之
poem.l: 京師/ns 花/n 柳/n 鬥/v 春/n 妍/a

名/n 在/v 玉/n 皇/n 香/n 案/n 前/f

錦/n 標/n 得/v 雋/n 合/d 推/v 先/n

poem.title: 贈錢塘張克正
poem.l: 酒/n 酣/v 合/d 奏/v 琵琶/n 箏/n
無/v 限/v 春/n 光/n 付/v 後/n 生/n

綠/n 楊/nr 影/n 裡/f 畫/v 船/n 橫/a

poem.title: 過千步廊街
poem.l: 古/n 今/n 異/v 代/n 不/d 同/v 時/n
閒/d 詠/v 龍/n 蛇/n 燕/n 雀/n 詩/n

内/f 園/n 次第/n 賞/v 荼/n 蘼/n

poem.title: 和人鞦韆
poem.l: 九/m 衢/ns 春/n 暖/a 雜/a 花/n 開/v

poem.title: 相府 一
poem.l: 春/n 遊/v 有/v 限/n 興/n 無/v 涯/f
屢/d 到/v 能/v 詩/n 宰/n 相/n 家/n
未/d 綠/v 先/n 黃/v 臨/v 砌/n 柳/n

陰/a 功/n 不/d 許/v 後/a 人/n 誇/v

poem.title: 相府 二
poem.l: 八/m 表/n 咸/d 知/v 天子/nr 尊/v
古/n 無/v 封/v 域/n 盛/v 王元/nr
相/n 分/v 左/f 右/f 參/v 機/n 務/v

禾/n 黍/n 豐/a 登/v 梨/n 棗/n 繁/v

poem.title: 奉答諸學士
poem.l: 聖/n 戒/v 盤/n 銘/n 亦/d 在/v 初/n
朝/n 回/v 便/a 殿/n 坐/d 看/v 書/n
五/m 風/n 十/m 雨/n 春/n 長/a 好/a
萬/m 戶/n 千/m 門/n 樂/n 有/v 餘/n
深/a 巷/n 隔/v 花/n 聞/v 按/v 曲/n
小/a 亭/n 臨/v 水/n 見/v 行/v 車/n
滄州/ns 日/n 暖/a 多/a 鵷/n 鷺/n
盡/v 泛/v 恩/n 波/n 到/v 石渠/ns

poem.title: 公主園
poem.l: 一/m 從/v 明/v 律/n 變/v 春/n 溫/a
無/v 數/m 流/a 鶯/n 滿/v 沁園/ns
翠/n 輦/n 穿/v 花/n 長公主/nr
緋/n 衣/n 束/v 帶/n 小/a 黃/n 門/n

彈/v 絲/n 吹/v 竹/n 到/v 芳/a 樽/n

poem.title: 有感 一
poem.l: 富/a 貴/a 抛/v 人/n 似/v 擲/v 梭/n
不/d 禁/v 騎/v 馬/n 再/d 經/v 過/v
太/nr 師/n 宅/n 廢/v 無/v 弦/n 管/n
丞/n 相/n 堂/n 新/d 有/v 綺羅/n
苦/a 李/n 開/v 花/n 春/n 不/d 少/a

poem.title: 有感 二
poem.l: 潮州司馬/nr 萬/m 羊/n 群/v
割/v 肉/n 充/v 庖/n 不/d 忍/v 聞/v
飲/v 酒/n 固/d 宜/v 澆/v 磊/n 塊/n
煮/v 茶/n 那/d 復/d 接/v 殷/a 勤/v
陳/ns 侯/nr 弊/a 席/n 門/n 前/f 設/v
丁/nr 氏/nr 香/n 爐/n 被/v 底/f 熏/v
總/d 道/v 夜/n 眠/v 忘/v 寵/n 辱/n
役/n 夫/n 何/r 事/n 夢/v 何/r 君/n

poem.title: 天曆三年 至治三年 甲子春，鄧公善之任國子祭酒，試禮部進士，甚公。善之謂予曰： 「袁伯長學士在京師累歲，不肯取鄉士。今年得程端禮兄弟，人亦不以我為私。」 余聞之喜，因謝。
poem.l: 桃/n 李/n 漫/a 山/n 不/d 肯/v 栽/v
先/n 生/n 新/a 手/n 斸/v 蒼/a 苔/n
舊/a 時/n 燕子/n 無/v 巢/n 宿/v
今/t 日/t 藤/n 花/n 借/v 樹/n 開/v
富/nr 弼/nr 推/v 恩/n 寧/d 為/v 友/n
祁/nr 奚/nr 舉/v 子/n 實/d 論/v 才/n
山/n 僧/n 亦/d 有/v 鄉/n 閭/n 念/v
建福/ns 門/n 前/f 幾/m 度/n 來/v

poem.title: 呈鄉士

凌/v 雲/n 詩/n 思/v 已/d 飄/a 然/u

poem.title: 宋時，和魯有觀畫鷹獵兔之詩曰：「 雖是丹青物，沉吟亦可傷。君誇鷹眼疾，我憫兔心忙。豈動騷人興，惟增獵客狂。鮫綃百餘尺，爭及製衣裳？」 范文正公嘆曰：「真仁人之言！」畫鷹尚且為戒，而況蓄真鷹，日斃禽鳥乎？余於京師見蓄鷹者，作詩二首，以為戒焉。 一
poem.l: 禽/n 獸/n 於/p 人/n 不/d 較/v 多/a

誰/r 似/v 當/v 年/t 人/n 姓/n 和/nr
